task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Docker context named 'prod'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the command 'docker context create prod' or the output of 'docker context ls' listing 'prod'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'prod' context is configured with the correct remote host and TLS certificates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the context creation command with flags pointing to port 2376 and the certificates in ~/credentials/ (ca.pem, cert.pem, key.pem), or 'docker context inspect prod' showing these TLS details.

task_completion.description: Verify the deployment of the 'prod-web' container using the 'nginx:1.24-alpine' image via the 'prod' context.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker --context prod run --name prod-web ... nginx:1.24-alpine' or a 'docker run' command executed after 'docker context use prod'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'prod-web' container is successfully running on the remote daemon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the output of 'docker --context prod ps' (or 'docker ps' if the context is active) listing the 'prod-web' container as running.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine terminal to execute commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands are typed and executed in a terminal emulator (e.g., GNOME Terminal, xterm), not a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify commands were actually executed and returned output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of command outputs, new shell prompts appearing after commands, or Docker daemon responses (e.g., container IDs).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the verification outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: No use of 'echo' or text manipulation tools to print fake 'docker ps' or 'docker context ls' outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Context name: 'prod'. Remote host: 'prod-node' on port 2376. Credentials directory: '/home/ga/credentials' containing 'ca.pem', 'cert.pem', and 'key.pem'. Workload container name: 'prod-web'. Workload image: 'nginx:1.24-alpine'.
